text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho has finally arrived, and
Maruzensky is excited to race alongside Special
Week.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Spe and I finally get to run together!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Looking at her past achievements, it's clear that
this race will be anything but easy...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But that just means it's definitely going to be fun!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm off, then! Cheer me on, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm off, then! Cheer me on, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Of course! I'll come back in first!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Whoa there, are you nervous?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I guess I am a little...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I'm having fun too! I'm so excited, I can't calm
down!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I finally get to race on the same turf as the
athlete I've looked up to since before my debut!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! I'm so happy to run in the same race as
you too, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But today, don't think of me as someone you look
up to...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You should come at me as your rival!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: My rival...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay then, you'll be the rival I chase down... and pass before the finish!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's enjoy this race! It's going to be the best!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah!
